title: Kenyan Chickpea Salad
description: A refreshing and flavorful salad inspired by the cuisine of Kenya, perfect for a light vegetarian meal.

ingredients.name: Mixed Greens
ingredients.notes: such as lettuce, spinach, and arugula

ingredients.name: Crispy Onions
ingredients.notes: such as fried onions or crispy fried shallots

ingredients.name: Salad
ingredients.notes: such as cherry tomatoes, cucumber, and carrots

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the chickpeas, mixed greens, crispy onions, and floral watermelon seeds.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the dressing ingredients.
3. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
6. Just before serving, sprinkle the salad with additional crispy onions and watermelon seeds if desired.
